<?php namespace Tests\Feature\Auth; use App\Models\User; use Livewire\Volt\Volt; test('confirm password screen can be rendered', function () { $user = User::factory()->create(); $response = $this->actingAs($user)->get('/confirm-password'); $response ->assertSeeVolt('pages.auth.confirm-password') ->assertStatus(200); }); test('password can be confirmed', function () { $user = User::factory()->create(); $this->actingAs($user); $component = Volt::test('pages.auth.confirm-password') ->set('password', 'password'); $component->call('confirmPassword'); $component ->assertRedirect('/dashboard') ->assertHasNoErrors(); }); test('password is not confirmed with invalid password', function () { $user = User::factory()->create(); $this->actingAs($user); $component = Volt::test('pages.auth.confirm-password') ->set('password', 'wrong-password'); $component->call('confirmPassword'); $component ->assertNoRedirect() ->assertHasErrors('password'); });
